description: Natural objects with magical or symbolic significance.
items: Feather
A shimmering plume from a creature of legend.
Fang
A sharp tooth pulled from a fearsome beast.
Mushroom
A strange fungus with unpredictable magical properties.
Acorn
A tiny seed holding the promise of an ancient tree.
Amber
A golden drop of fossilized resin with something trapped inside.
Antler
A branching horn shed by a creature of the deep woods.
Scale
A tough, iridescent plate from a dragon or serpent.
Herb
A fragrant plant with healing or enchanting properties.
Seashell
A spiral shell that whispers with the voice of the sea.
Coral
A branching growth from the ocean floor, hard as stone.
Pearl
A luminous sphere formed in the heart of an oyster.
